jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Gati
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gati family as a Fleet Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
